question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/controller/ConsensusController.java -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: subscribeTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user open thousands of concurrent gRPC streams to subscribeTopic() with no rate limiting or connection cap enforced at the controller layer, exhausting server-side thread/connection resources and degrading service availability for all legitimate subscribers?
